sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41608" key="e)pixa/rths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιχάρ-της</orth>, <sense id="n41608.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ou,</tr_> <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who rejoices malignantly,</tr_> Philonid.II : condemned by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.101</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
